metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_168
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors use vGlut-pHluorin imaging and RNA knockdown to study the role of calcineurin A gamma (gene symbol PPP3CC) in the synaptic vesicle cycle. Knockdown led to a significant slowing of vesicle endocytosis. This was rescued by reintroduction of calcineurin gamma, but not alpha or beta isoforms. In addition, calcineurin gamma with a mutation in the catalytic domain of calcineurin also does not rescue. As control for the knockdown, immunofluoresence is provided.. Experimental description: Rat hippocampal neurons were co-transfected with a Ppp3cc-specific shRNA and the vGlut1-pHluorin construct, and immunocytochemistry analysis for
CNA was performed to confirm knockdown of the CNA protein.
